content:
# Session 17 (iter-017) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- **Targets:** FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` (b2 mate legs, NEW phase) + SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean` (`hK_lhs` recipe tail).
- **Sorry-bearing decls (cold-build verified firsthand):** FBC 7 (1481/1590/1629/1680/1879/2154/2194), SNAP 5 (2054/2855/2878/2899/2958). FBC closed `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` (was sorry → now sorry-free) + added new sorry-free helper `natTrans_ext_of_unit`. SNAP eliminated 0.
- **Both files cold-build GREEN (review-verified):** FBC 8318 jobs, SNAP 2441 jobs, 0 errors, 0 kernel timeouts. 0 axioms. blueprint-doctor: 0 findings. No regression.
- sync_leanok iter-17 sha 1218fb6 (+3/−2).

## FBC — HEADLINE: b2 mate phase opened; key algebraic per-piece mate fact CLOSED + reusable engine landed
iter-016 closed the FBC foundation sorry-free; iter-017 is the FIRST iter on the b2-crux mate-leg phase.

- **`conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` CLOSED cold-green** (the algebraic per-piece mate fact, the obstacle both legs build on). 3 attempts:
  - A1 element-wise `dsimp [conjugateEquiv]` → `∘ₗ`-composite cannot be peeled (the `restrictScalars g ⋙ restrictScalars f` value-diamond; `erw` over-unfolds counit to raw `TensorProduct.lift`). DEAD.
  - A2 counit-side uniqueness (`conjugateEquiv_counit`) → CIRCULAR (rewrites back to the original goal). DEAD.
  - A3 **unit-side uniqueness via a NEW general helper** → SOLVED. Only the unit transpose has Mathlib content (`ModuleCat.homEquiv_extendScalarsComp`); both sides satisfy the same unit relation, so equal.
- **NEW reusable helper `natTrans_ext_of_unit` CLOSED** (category-agnostic): two natTrans of right adjoints with the same unit transpose against a fixed `α` are equal. Tooling note (KB): in the abstract category `rw`/`simp only` fail to match `≫`-subterms with `.app`/`.map` heads — only FULL `simp` matches; idiom = `have e1 := by simp; rw [e1, Category.assoc]; simp [reassoc_of% …]`.
- **`chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp` (algebraic leg) — PARTIAL.** `natTrans_ext_of_unit` reduction discharges the conjugate side; residual 3-factor composite-unit coherence is blocked because `letI : Algebra` instances in the `…ReassocNat` defs emit `Eq.mpr`/`id` casts wrapping the iso composites. Fix named: (a) re-state the defs without `letI` casts, or (b) two `conjugateEquiv_comp` splits.
- **`chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate` (geometric leg) — BLOCKED, reverted to stub.** The identical scaffold's `refine` whnf-TIMES OUT (200k hb) at `unit_conjugateEquiv` — elaborating `conjugateEquiv` over the binary-composite `Scheme.Modules` adjunctions in `(Spec _).Modules` is too expensive. Mathlib has NO `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (comment-fiction, CONFIRMED). Prover honored revert-on-bomb (file ends green). Real elaboration-cost wall, not a missing tactic.
- Glue / crux / dead-mate / 2 seeds untouched (out of scope).

## SNAP — `hK_lhs` step (a) SOLVED + committed, but 0 eliminated — new reassoc wall
- **Step (a) (the HARD-GATE re-split) is SOLVED + committed cold-green.** A1: the directive's `slice_lhs 2 2 => rw [← Category.assoc]` immediately isDefEq-timeouts (the pc017 HARD-GATE condition) → pivoted to the sanctioned standalone-`have` alternative. A2: an isolated `have hsplit` (proved by `rw [← tensorHom_id, ← tensor_comp]; congr 1` — `congr 1`/term-mode bomb-free where `rw [Category.assoc]` bombs even isolated), substituted via **`congrArg`-peel of the whole outer context** `refine (congrArg (fun t => μ.inv ≫ t ≫ _) hsplit).trans ?_` (NOT `rw [hsplit]`/`conv => rw`, which motive-bomb). Goal advanced from the merged-`M` stage to `μ.inv ≫ ((W≫T)≫α) = K`.
- **NEW WALL at the very next move (A3): reassoc `(W≫T)≫α → W≫(T≫α)`.** Every mechanism (`rw`/`simp only [Category.assoc]`/`conv_lhs => enter [2]; rw`/`congrArg`-with-fresh-objects/`associator_naturality` on the main goal) isDefEq/whnf-bombs on the localized-tensor μ-objects. The isolated-`have` escape is ALSO blocked: freshly STATING the `whiskerRight (c_{A⊗B}≫μ.inv) …` junction bombs at elaboration. VERIFIED: step (b) (`associator_naturality`+`associator_hom_app`) fires bomb-free ONCE right-associated — the whole tail unblocks the instant a bomb-free reassoc exists.
- 0 sorry eliminated. This is the 6th iter `hK_lhs` is the live blocker — a CHURNING/STUCK route (pc017 flagged CHURNING). The merge-wall successor wall is the same root cause as the iter-016 head wall (the `(toMonoidalCategory …).obj` vs `sheafification.obj` dual-instance mismatch).

## Key findings / patterns (→ Knowledge Base)
- `natTrans_ext_of_unit` mate-uniqueness engine + abstract-category `≫`-subterm matching idiom (FBC, reusable for both legs).
- Bomb-free transformer principle for localized-tensor-μ goals: the ONLY bomb-free transformation is an equation whose two sides are EXACT goal subterms, applied by `congrArg`-peel with holes (SNAP step (a)).
- New Known Blockers recorded: SNAP reassoc `(W≫T)≫α` wall; FBC geometric-leg `conjugateEquiv`-over-`(Spec _).Modules` whnf-bomb; FBC algebraic-leg `Eq.mpr` cast strip.

## Subagent findings (reports in logs/iter-017/)
- **lvbc-snap017** (PASS, 0 must-fix / 1 major): `hK_lhs` Lean matches blueprint exactly, proof correctly `sorry`, `% NOTE` caveat intact, no stale `\leanok`. Major: the NOTE's "one mechanical recipe tail from closing" line is contradicted by the iter-017 reassoc wall → **REFRESHED** (see manual markers).
- **lvbc-fbc017** (PASS, 0 must-fix): 2 mate theorems faithful (honest WIP sorries, proof blocks correctly unmarked), 2 sorry-free helpers, no axioms/admit. Coverage debt: `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` + `natTrans_ext_of_unit` have no `\lean{}` block → planner dispatch. Blueprint-adequacy gap: both mate proofs abandoned the chapter-named `*_mateEquiv_*_vcomp` route for the `natTrans_ext_of_unit` route; geometric-leg sketch still points at the whnf-intractable `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` route → **`% NOTE` added** (see manual markers). Caveat: `lean_verify` couldn't cold axiom-check (LSP init error) — sorry-free status confirmed by my own cold `lake build` + source scan.
- **lean-auditor iter017** (PASS, 0 critical / 3 major / 9 minor, no must-fix): all 3 majors are FBC dead-mate-region hygiene — stale ~60-line STATUS narrative in `pushforward_spec_tilde_iso` docstring (L184-247, references prover-internal "iter-234/236/241"); 3 dead stacked `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` before `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` (L1856-1858, only innermost 1.6M applies); misscoped `maxHeartbeats` before a section comment (L1821). All MEDIUM, bundle into the mate-excision/cleanup lane.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs`: refreshed the stale `% NOTE` — replaced "one mechanical recipe tail from closing" with the iter-017 state (step (a) committed cold-green; NEW reassoc `(W≫T)≫α` wall; NOT one tail from closing; needs statement-pinned reassoc lemma OR dual-instance refactor). (lvbc-snap017 finding.)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate`: added `% NOTE` — realized route diverges from the chapter's `conjugateEquiv_mateEquiv_vcomp` sketch (uses `natTrans_ext_of_unit`); geometric leg is STUB-sorry (whnf-bomb over `(Spec _).Modules`); the per-piece `conjugateEquiv (pullbackComp).hom = (pushforwardComp).inv` has no Mathlib provider; `\leanok` = signature only. (lvbc-fbc017 finding.)
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync correct: both legs statement-`\leanok` only, proof blocks unmarked; 2 closed helpers are unmatched/unblueprinted so carry no marker yet). No `\mathlibok`, no `\lean{}` rename, no stale `\notready`.

## Notes (LOW)
- lean-auditor 9 minors = accumulated stale scaffolding in the compile-dead FBC mate region (same class as iter-014/015/016). Bundle with the majors into the mate-excision lane.
- 2 new unmatched Lean decls (`natTrans_ext_of_unit`, `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp`) + 4 pre-existing `chartBaseChange*Nat` defs (coverage debt) — listed in recommendations.md.
